name: Classic Leather Jacket
description: A timeless leather jacket crafted from premium full-grain leather. Features a classic moto design with zippered pockets and adjustable waist tabs. Perfect for adding an edge to any outfit.

name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Experience crystal-clear audio with industry-leading noise cancellation. Up to 30 hours of battery life, plush ear cushions, and seamless Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity.

name: Minimalist Analog Watch
description: A sleek, minimalist timepiece with a genuine leather strap. Japanese quartz movement ensures precise timekeeping. Water-resistant up to 30 meters.

name: Premium Running Shoes
description: Engineered for performance with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Lightweight design with superior grip for road and trail running.

name: Smart Fitness Tracker
description: Track your health and fitness goals with heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, and GPS. 7-day battery life with a vibrant AMOLED display.

name: Canvas Backpack
description: Durable waxed canvas backpack with padded laptop compartment. Multiple organizer pockets and adjustable ergonomic straps for all-day comfort.

name: Polarized Aviator Sunglasses
description: Classic aviator frames with polarized UV400 lenses. Lightweight metal construction with spring hinges for a comfortable, secure fit.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Compact yet powerful speaker with 360-degree sound. IPX7 waterproof rating, 12-hour playtime, and built-in microphone for hands-free calls.
